item.name: Minted Arowana
item.description:
Prized for both their appearance and their sturdy scales, these arowanas are a favorite among the Xbr'aal.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Beloved by many, this wavekin's durable golden scales have been put to different uses over the years, and at one point were even used as a form of currency. Presently, the Xbr'aal utilize the scales to decorate their armor, to splendidly shiny effect.
